title: Buy Land
goalDescription: Setting aside money toward a land purchase — often the first step before building.
resultIntro: Here's a starting point for saving toward your land purchase, based on what you entered.

questions.label: Estimated cost of the land
questions.help: Include documentation and registration costs if you can, not just the asking price.

questions.label: Amount already saved toward this goal
Expected annual return on savings (%)
questions.help: Leave at 0% if this will sit in a regular savings account rather than an interest-bearing one.
